scope.target: Align Roslyn analyzers and tests with the approved Use Case and Handler dependency model
constraints: Depends on approved decisions and synchronized standards
Prefer semantic markers and type relationships over broad naming heuristics
Support staged migration without hiding invalid target architecture
Do not encode non-deterministic orchestration quality as syntax rules

inputs.architecture_target: Executable validation for deterministic inbound-port and adapter boundaries
review_findings: Current tests accept concrete Handler injection in Controllers
Current analyzer groups Use Cases and Handlers by naming
No rule detects combined Execute/Handle roles

steps: Translate approved deterministic rules into diagnostics
Add positive, negative, migration, and false-positive tests
validation: Forbidden Handler/dispatcher injection fails when covered
Legitimate message/event handlers avoid false positives
